description_long: This is a classic single-wheel wheelbarrow, commonly used for transporting materials in gardens, construction sites, and urban maintenance areas. The main body consists of a deep, slightly tapered metal tray with a weathered green finish, designed to hold loose or bulky materials. Two sturdy, straight handles extend from the rear, covered with textured grips for better control and comfort during use. The front features a single, robust black wheel mounted centrally beneath the tray, supported by a metal frame that curves downward to form stable legs. The frame and legs are constructed from tubular metal, providing both strength and lightweight maneuverability. The overall design is utilitarian, with no side rails, and the tray is recessed to prevent spillage during movement.
description: A green, metal wheelbarrow with a deep tray, single front wheel, and two straight handles for manual transport. The design is sturdy and utilitarian, ideal for carrying materials in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the deep tray, two handles extending backward, and the single wheel and support frame beneath.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the handles, the depth of the tray, and the position of the single front wheel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open tray, the two handles with grips, and the supporting legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the tray profile, handle length, and wheel placement.
